step_by_step_thinking:
I agree with the selection of A (Tmax and Cmax). While Tmax indicates the speed of reaching peak plasma concentration, combining it with Cmax offers a comprehensive view of both the kinetics and dynamics of drug absorption. Cmax specifically quantifies the highest level reached during this process, crucial for understanding therapeutic efficacy and potential toxicity risks associated with high concentrations. Thus, using both measures together ensures an accurate assessment of drug absorption rates.
